prompt: Turn the project bootstrap copilot idea into a PRD in docs/prd. Use parent idea-00001-project-bootstrap-copilot and focus on a guided repository setup flow for new projects.
assertions: The run creates exactly one new markdown file under docs/prd.
The new file front matter has type prd, role main, status draft, and parent idea-00001-project-bootstrap-copilot.
The new file includes the standard PRD sections and at least two FR-xx checklist items.
